RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. MS. McGAHEY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR 1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Continued To Feb-15-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GOSS JEWETT OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: STEVEN YUEN, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. CARY A. KINKEAD, ESQUIRE (GORDON & REES, 619.230.7776) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 15, 2007. BOTH COUNSEL ARE TO SUBMIT SIMULTANEOUS BRIEFS BY 9 A. M. ON FEBRUARY 14, 2007. THE ISSUE TO BE BRIEFED IS AS FOLLOWS: DISCUSS WHETHER THE COURT HAS THE AUTHORITY TO ALLOW THE MOVING PARTY TO SUPPLEMENT THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BASED ON THE FACTS THAT WERE NOT AVAILABLE TO MOVING PARTY PRIOR TO FILING THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND WHERE MOVING PARTY CAN DEMONSTRATE THAT IT EXERCISED DUE DILLIGENCE IN SEEKING THOSE FACTS. (302/PJM/AP) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
